working_on.notes: System is stable. Refactored to Uncontrolled Components to fix all bridge-related bugs.

recent_changes.description: Switched BasicForm to Uncontrolled architecture (FormData + defaultValue).
recent_changes.impact: Eliminated state-sync bugs and stale closures when bridging with Vanilla JS.
Professional UX with data protection on cancel.

decisions_made.decision: Use Uncontrolled Components for Sitecore BasicForms
decisions_made.reason: React's controlled state is too difficult to sync reliably with external scripts that manipulate the DOM directly.
